title: T-113 — UI: NutritionPanel (per-100g traffic-light bars) (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-113 — NutritionPanel slice

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1 (live <50 ms recompute)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:26-65 (NutritionPanel)
Prototype-index entry: nutrition_panel

## Goal
Single-component slice translating the prototype NutritionPanel into a production React Client Component. Renders per-100g values for 7 nutrients (Energy, Fat, Saturates, Carbs, Sugars, Protein, Salt) with traffic-light progress bars (green ≤ target, amber > target ≤ max, red > max). Subscribes to formulation state from parent and re-renders reactively.

## Implementation contract
- apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/_components/nutrition-panel.tsx ('use client'). Props: { nutrition: NutritionSummary } where NutritionSummary is the per-100g output of recomputeCalc.
- Use shadcn Card + Progress (or Tailwind div progress fill) + CardFooter for targets note per prototype_index translation_notes.
- Memoise rendering — do not call recomputeCalc inside the panel; consume value from parent props.
- 'Export label' button stub renders but is no-op for this slice (label export handled elsewhere).

## Files (≤ 3)
- apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/_components/nutrition-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/_components/__tests__/nutrition-panel.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the panel renders with a fixed nutrition prop, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:26-65 (NutritionPanel), then it displays 7 rows (Energy/Fat/Saturates/Carbs/Sugars/Protein/Salt) with per-100g values, units, and traffic-light bars (green/amber/red) — verified by RTL structural parity
2. Given the parent formulation state changes (new nutrition prop), when the panel re-renders, then values update reactively in the same render cycle — verified by RTL act/rerender test
3. Given the panel renders, then layout matches prototype dashboard-tile (Card + header + 7 progress rows + footer targets note) — verified by snapshot + shadcn Card primitives used

## Test strategy
- RED: nutrition-panel.test.tsx asserting 7 nutrient rows, traffic-light class assignment per value, reactive rerender on prop change — before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test nutrition-panel'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call recomputeCalc inside the panel (parent owns state)
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not exceed scope_files (1 component + 1 test)
